items.title: All-hands: Sam Altman defended OpenAI's DOD deal, saying it was the right decision with "extremely difficult brand consequences and very negative" short-term PR (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: All-hands: Sam Altman defended OpenAI's DOD deal, saying it was the right decision with "extremely difficult brand consequences and very negative" short-term PR (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 全体人员：萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 为 OpenAI 与国防部的交易进行了辩护，称这是一个正确的决定，但会带来“极其困难的品牌后果和非常负面的”短期公关（Berber Jin/华尔街日报）
